pi_items.source: Web search and HTTP fetch confirmed books.toscrape.com is a real public website designed for web scraping practice
URL parsing and web verification confirmed this is the correct domain from the target_url
Path is referenced in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, confirmed as the export directory for CSV results
Path is referenced in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh, confirmed as the reports directory for text reports
XPath tested against actual HTML from https://books.toscrape.com/ using lxml, returns ['width=device-width'], confirming this XPath is correct and finds the viewport meta tag

XPath tested against actual HTML from https://books.toscrape.com/ using lxml. The site contains <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8"/> (older format) not <meta charset="..."/> (HTML5 format). The XPath returns [] (empty result), indicating this expression will not extract any data from this website.
XPath tested against actual HTML from https://books.toscrape.com/ using lxml. The website does not contain any <meta property="og:title"> tags. The XPath returns [] (empty result).
XPath tested against actual HTML from https://books.toscrape.com/ using lxml. The website does not contain any <meta property="og:image"> tags. The XPath returns [] (empty result).

privileged_info_summary: The target URL https://books.toscrape.com/ is a real public website designed for web scraping practice. The domain name books.toscrape.com is correct. The file paths specified for CSV export and report generation are reasonable and match those used by the task setup scripts. However, three of the four XPath expressions specified in the metadata are incorrect or will not find any results on the actual website: //meta[@charset]/@charset returns no results because the site uses the legacy http-equiv format instead of HTML5 charset attribute; //meta[@property='og:title']/@content and //meta[@property='og:image']/@content will not find any elements because the website does not include these Open Graph meta tags.
